details.test: Task 1 - Open EUR/USD market buy with SL/TP
Task 2 - Trade lowest-spread major forex pair
Task 3 - Open position with margin requirement under $500
Task 4 - Create custom watchlist and add active instruments
Task 5 - Favorite top instrument on most profitable day
Task 6 - Move SL to breakeven and extend TP
Task 7 - Set EUR/USD price alert around USD economic event
Task 8 - Close all losing positions worse than -$30
Task 9 - Create EUR/USD OCO buy stop / sell stop
